inputs.label: Current Share Price
inputs.businessContext: Market price per share at current time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Market price per share at current time.
businessContext_i18n.de: Marktpreis pro Aktie zum aktuellen Zeitpunkt.

inputs.label: Average Purchase Price per Share
inputs.businessContext: The average price paid per share (cost basis).

businessContext_i18n.en: The average price paid per share (cost basis).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hisse başına ödenen ortalama fiyat (maliyet bazı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der durchschnittlich pro Aktie gezahlte Preis (Kostenbasis).

inputs.label: Annual Dividend per Share
inputs.businessContext: Total dividends paid per share over the last fiscal year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total dividends paid per share over the last fiscal year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son mali yılda hisse başına ödenen toplam temettü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe der pro Aktie gezahlten Dividenden im letzten Geschäftsjahr.

inputs.label: Number of Shares Owned
inputs.businessContext: Total number of shares held in the portfolio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of shares held in the portfolio.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im Portfolio gehaltenen Aktien.

inputs.label: Expected Dividend Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual projected growth rate of dividends, as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual projected growth rate of dividends, as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temettülerin yıllık tahmini büyüme oranı, yüzde olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche prognostizierte Wachstumsrate der Dividenden in Prozent.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
